attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	
CNTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,TAC.SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY
,TAC.BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT
,TAC.SRC_RPTD_SR_NUMBER_INT
,TAC.DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
,UNK_REF.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,UNK_REF.TAC_SLK_ALLOCATION_RATIO
,'UNKNOWN_ALLOCATION' ALLOCATION_TYPE
,0 AS RMA_COST
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_SRVC_SUPPORT_CENTER_COST TAC
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CNTL
 ON TAC.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
 INNER JOIN   $$STGDB.WI_CCM_SSC_UNK_SK_ALLOC  UNK_REF
 ON CNTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME=UNK_REF.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH 
ON	RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = UNK_REF.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( 
SEL	SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY 
FROM	 $$STGDB.WI_CCM_SSC_ID_SALES_TERR_KEY  ID_SLK  
WHERE	ID_SLK.SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY=TAC.SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY)

SELECT 
UNK_DRIVER.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME  
,UNK_DRIVER.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME  
,UNK_DRIVER.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  
,UNK_DRIVER.THEATRE_SSC_AMOUNT  
,SUM(UNK_DRIVER.THEATRE_SSC_AMOUNT) OVER(PARTITION BY UNK_DRIVER.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME) TOTAL_THEATRE_SSC_AMOUNT
,CAST(UNK_DRIVER.THEATRE_SSC_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(27,14))/CAST(TOTAL_THEATRE_SSC_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(27,14))  TAC_SLK_ALLOCATION_RATIO 
,UNK_DRIVER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE 


FROM (  

SELECT  UNK_DRIVER2.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,UNK_DRIVER2.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME  
,UNK_DRIVER2.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,UNK_DRIVER2.THEATRE_SSC_AMOUNT 
,UNK_DRIVER2.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE   FROM 
( SELECT 
CNTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME   /*TS COGS   SL Enrichment changes  */
,RSH.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE                            /*TS COGS   SL Enrichment changes  */
,max(DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY) DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,SUM((SSC_DPT_PRSNL_RSRC_CST_USD_AMT+	SSC_DEPRECIATION_COST_USD_AMT +	SSC_REPAIR_COST_USD_AMT    +	SSC_DUTY_VAT_COST_USD_AMT    +	SSC_THRD_PRTY_LGST_CST_USD_AMT+	SSC_THRD_PRTY_MTNC_CST_USD_AMT+	SSC_ORIG_EQP_MFGR_CST_USD_AMT ) *ID_SLK.SA_SLK_ALLOCATION_RATIO  )   THEATRE_SSC_AMOUNT  
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_SRVC_SUPPORT_CENTER_COST TAC
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CNTL
ON TAC.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
INNER JOIN   $$STGDB.WI_CCM_SSC_ID_SALES_TERR_KEY ID_SLK
ON(TAC.SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY=ID_SLK.SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY AND ID_SLK.ALLOCATION_TYPE='DIRECT_MAP')
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_ME RSH
ON (RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=ID_SLK.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY /* AND DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME IN ('Americas','APJC','EMEA')   */  /*TS COGS   SL Enrichment changes  */
 and RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'WW Distribution'  ) /*TS COGS   SL Enrichment changes  */
AND PURE_OVERLAY_FLG <> 'Y'  /*COGS - Enhancement to STK tagging */
GROUP BY        
CNTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
,RSH.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
) UNK_DRIVER2


UNION ALL

SELECT 
UNK_DRIVER1.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,UNK_DRIVER1.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME  
,UNK_DRIVER1.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,UNK_DRIVER1.THEATRE_SSC_AMOUNT 
, ''  L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE  FROM
(
SELECT 
CNTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME  /*TS COGS   SL Enrichment changes  */
,max(DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY) DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,SUM((SSC_DPT_PRSNL_RSRC_CST_USD_AMT+	SSC_DEPRECIATION_COST_USD_AMT +	SSC_REPAIR_COST_USD_AMT    +	SSC_DUTY_VAT_COST_USD_AMT    +	SSC_THRD_PRTY_LGST_CST_USD_AMT+	SSC_THRD_PRTY_MTNC_CST_USD_AMT+	SSC_ORIG_EQP_MFGR_CST_USD_AMT ) *ID_SLK.SA_SLK_ALLOCATION_RATIO  )   THEATRE_SSC_AMOUNT  
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_SRVC_SUPPORT_CENTER_COST TAC
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CNTL
ON TAC.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
INNER JOIN   $$STGDB.WI_CCM_SSC_ID_SALES_TERR_KEY ID_SLK
ON(TAC.SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY=ID_SLK.SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY 
AND	ID_SLK.ALLOCATION_TYPE='DIRECT_MAP_USING_CONTRACT')
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_ME RSH
ON (RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=ID_SLK.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  /* AND DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME IN ('Americas','APJC','EMEA')  */ /*TS COGS   SL Enrichment changes  */
and RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE <> 'WW Distribution'  ) /*TS COGS   SL Enrichment changes  */
AND PURE_OVERLAY_FLG <> 'Y'  /*COGS - Enhancement to STK tagging */
GROUP BY CNTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
) UNK_DRIVER1 ) UNK_DRIVER

QUALIFY TOTAL_THEATRE_SSC_AMOUNT<>0 
AND THEATRE_SSC_AMOUNT<>0

SELECT	
 CNTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
, CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
 ,TAC.SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY
  ,TAC.BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT
 ,TAC.SRC_RPTD_SR_NUMBER_INT
 ,TAC.DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
 ,CCM_MAP_REF.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 , 1 SA_SLK_ALLOCATION_RATIO
   ,'CXCE_MAP_SCMS_COUNTRY_THEATER' ALLOCATION_TYPE
   ,0 AS RMA_COST
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_SRVC_SUPPORT_CENTER_COST TAC
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CNTL
 ON TAC.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CCM_C3_MKT_SGMT_SCMS_MAP SCMS_MAP
 ON SCMS_MAP.C3_MARKET_SEGMENT=TAC.C3_CUST_MARKET_SEGMENT_NAME
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CCM_C3_CST_THTR_SL1_MAP SL1_MAP  
 ON SL1_MAP.C3_CUST_THEATER=TAC.C3_CUSTOMER_THEATER_NAME
 INNER JOIN (
 SELECT  DISTINCT 
 SALES_COVERAGE_CODE,
 DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME,
 ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE,
SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
SL1
FROM (
  SELECT 
 RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE
 ,RSH.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME
 ,CNTRY.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
 ,RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 ,CASE WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR='Americas' THEN 'AMERICAS'  
       WHEN L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR='APJC__' THEN 'APJC' 
	   WHEN L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR='EMEAR-REGION' THEN 'EMEA' 
	   ELSE RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR
	   END AS SL1-- ADDED THIS TO MAKE SL1 AND C3 IN SYNC
 ,SUM(COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT) TSS_REV
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_PNL_REV_COST_MEASURE MSR
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_ME RSH 
	ON	RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=MSR.BK_TRNGLTD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY CNTRY 
	ON	CNTRY.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=RSH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
	INNER JOIN (SELECT CTRL_FISCAL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,RFISCAL.FISCAL_QTR_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER, RFISCAL.FISCAL_MONTH_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER,CTRL_FISCAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT   
		FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFISCAL  
		INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CTRL_FISCAL
ON  CTRL_FISCAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=RFISCAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AND CTRL_FISCAL.MONTH_RANK=1) REV_MTH
ON 1=1 
WHERE MSR.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  IN (202110,202109,202108)
--BETWEEN REV_MTH.FISCAL_QTR_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER AND   REV_MTH.FISCAL_MONTH_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER
AND MSR.DV_PRODUCT_TYPE='SERVICE'
 AND MSR.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD ='REVENUE'
 AND MSR.DV_PNL_REV_COST_TYPE= 'TSS_REVENUE'
 AND DV_PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME LIKE 'TS%' 
	AND	DV_PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME NOT IN ('TS REVENUE_MANADJ')
 AND CNTRY.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE <> 'UNK'-- ADDED THIS RULE
 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5
 )A  WHERE  A.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME=A.SL1 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SALES_COVERAGE_CODE,DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME,ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE  ORDER	BY TSS_REV DESC) =1
   )  CCM_MAP_REF
 ON   CCM_MAP_REF.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE=SCMS_MAP.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE 
	AND	CCM_MAP_REF.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE=TAC.SRC_RPTD_SITE_CNTRY_NAME 
 --AND CCM_MAP_REF.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME = SL1_MAP.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME 
 AND CCM_MAP_REF.SL1=SL1_MAP.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME-- ADDED THIS TO MAKE SL1 AND C3 IN SYNC
 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( 
SEL	SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY 
FROM	 $$STGDB.WI_CCM_SSC_ID_SALES_TERR_KEY  ID_SLK  
 WHERE ID_SLK.SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY=TAC.SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY)

SELECT	
 CNTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
, CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
 ,TAC.SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY
   ,TAC.BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT
 ,TAC.SRC_RPTD_SR_NUMBER_INT
 ,TAC.DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
 ,CCM_MAP_REF.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 , 1 SA_SLK_ALLOCATION_RATIO
   ,'CXCE_MAP_COUNTRY_THEATER' ALLOCATION_TYPE
   ,0 AS RMA_COST
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_SRVC_SUPPORT_CENTER_COST TAC
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CNTL
 ON TAC.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
 /*INNER JOIN ETLVWDB.EL_CCM_C3_MKT_SGMT_SCMS_MAP SCMS_MAP-- NO WHERE THIS IS BEING USED. HENCE REMOVED.
 ON SCMS_MAP.C3_MARKET_SEGMENT=TAC.C3_CUST_MARKET_SEGMENT_NAME */
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CCM_C3_CST_THTR_SL1_MAP SL1_MAP  
 ON SL1_MAP.C3_CUST_THEATER=TAC.C3_CUSTOMER_THEATER_NAME  
 INNER JOIN (
 SELECT  DISTINCT 
 ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE,DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, SL1
 FROM (
 SELECT 
 CNTRY.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE,RSH.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME
 ,RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  ,CASE WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR='Americas' THEN 'AMERICAS'  
       WHEN L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR='APJC__' THEN 'APJC' 
	   WHEN L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR='EMEAR-REGION' THEN 'EMEA' 
	   ELSE RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR
	   END AS SL1-- ADDED THIS TO MAKE SL1 AND C3 IN SYNC
 ,SUM(COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT) TSS_REV
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_PNL_REV_COST_MEASURE  MSR
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_ME RSH 
	ON	RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=MSR.BK_TRNGLTD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY CNTRY 
	ON	CNTRY.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=RSH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
	INNER JOIN (SELECT CTRL_FISCAL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,RFISCAL.FISCAL_QTR_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER, RFISCAL.FISCAL_MONTH_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER,CTRL_FISCAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT   
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFISCAL  
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CTRL_FISCAL
ON  CTRL_FISCAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=RFISCAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AND CTRL_FISCAL.MONTH_RANK=1) REV_MTH
ON 1=1 
WHERE MSR.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT   IN (202110,202109,202108)
--BETWEEN REV_MTH.FISCAL_QTR_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER AND   REV_MTH.FISCAL_MONTH_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER
  AND MSR.DV_PRODUCT_TYPE='SERVICE'
 AND MSR.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD ='REVENUE'
 AND MSR.DV_PNL_REV_COST_TYPE= 'TSS_REVENUE'
 AND DV_PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME LIKE 'TS%' 
	AND	DV_PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME NOT IN ('TS REVENUE_MANADJ')
  AND CNTRY.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE <> 'UNK'-- ADDED THIS RULE
 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4
 )A
WHERE  A.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME=A.SL1 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME,ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE  ORDER	BY TSS_REV DESC) =1
 )  CCM_MAP_REF
 ON  (CCM_MAP_REF.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE=TAC.SRC_RPTD_SITE_CNTRY_NAME  
	--and	CCM_MAP_REF.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME=SL1_MAP.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME
	and	CCM_MAP_REF.SL1=SL1_MAP.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME-- ADDED THIS TO MAKE SL1 AND C3 IN SYNC
	) 
 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( 
SEL	SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY 
FROM	 $$STGDB.WI_CCM_SSC_ID_SALES_TERR_KEY  ID_SLK  
WHERE	ID_SLK.SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY=TAC.SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY)

SELECT	
  CNTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
 ,CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT	
 ,TAC.SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY
 ,TAC.BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT
 ,TAC.SRC_RPTD_SR_NUMBER_INT
 ,TAC.DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
 ,CCM_MAP_REF.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 ,1 SA_SLK_ALLOCATION_RATIO
 ,'CXCE_MAP_COUNTRY' ALLOCATION_TYPE
 ,0 AS RMA_COST
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_SRVC_SUPPORT_CENTER_COST TAC
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CNTL
 ON TAC.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
/* INNER JOIN ETLVWDB.EL_CCM_C3_MKT_SGMT_SCMS_MAP SCMS_MAP -- NO WHERE THIS JOIN IS BEING USED, HENCE REMOVED
 ON SCMS_MAP.C3_MARKET_SEGMENT=TAC.C3_CUST_MARKET_SEGMENT_NAME */
 INNER JOIN (
 SELECT  DISTINCT ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE ,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 FROM (
	 SELECT 
	 CNTRY.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
	 ,RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
	 ,SUM(COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT) TSS_REV
	 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_PNL_REV_COST_MEASURE  MSR
	 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_ME RSH 
		ON	RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=MSR.BK_TRNGLTD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
	 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY CNTRY 
		ON	CNTRY.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=RSH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
		INNER JOIN (SELECT CTRL_FISCAL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,RFISCAL.FISCAL_QTR_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER, RFISCAL.FISCAL_MONTH_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER,CTRL_FISCAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT   
	FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFISCAL  
	INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CTRL_FISCAL
	ON  CTRL_FISCAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=RFISCAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AND CTRL_FISCAL.MONTH_RANK=1) REV_MTH
	ON 1=1 
	WHERE MSR.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT   IN (202110,202109,202108)
	--BETWEEN REV_MTH.FISCAL_QTR_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER AND   REV_MTH.FISCAL_MONTH_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER
	  AND MSR.DV_PRODUCT_TYPE='SERVICE'
	 AND MSR.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD ='REVENUE'
	 AND MSR.DV_PNL_REV_COST_TYPE= 'TSS_REVENUE'
	 AND DV_PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME LIKE 'TS%' 
		AND	DV_PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME NOT IN ('TS REVENUE_MANADJ')
	  AND CNTRY.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE <> 'UNK'-- ADDED THIS RULE
	 GROUP BY 1,2
 )A
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE  ORDER	BY TSS_REV DESC) =1
)  CCM_MAP_REF
 ON  ( CCM_MAP_REF.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE=TAC.SRC_RPTD_SITE_CNTRY_NAME  )
 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SEL	SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY 
	FROM	 $$STGDB.WI_CCM_SSC_ID_SALES_TERR_KEY  ID_SLK  
	WHERE	ID_SLK.SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY=TAC.SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY)

SELECT 
 CNTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,TAC.SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY
,TAC.BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT
,TAC.SRC_RPTD_SR_NUMBER_INT
,TAC.DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
,CCM_MAP_REF.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,1 SA_SLK_ALLOCATION_RATIO
,'CXCE_MAP_THEATER' ALLOCATION_TYPE
,0 AS RMA_COST
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_SRVC_SUPPORT_CENTER_COST TAC
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CNTL
 ON TAC.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CCM_C3_CST_THTR_SL1_MAP SL1_MAP  
 ON SL1_MAP.C3_CUST_THEATER=TAC.C3_CUSTOMER_THEATER_NAME  
 INNER JOIN   (
 SELECT  DISTINCT 
 DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME
 ,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 ,SL1
 FROM (
 SELECT 
 RSH.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME
 ,RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
   ,CASE WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR='Americas' THEN 'AMERICAS'  
       WHEN L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR='APJC__' THEN 'APJC' 
	   WHEN L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR='EMEAR-REGION' THEN 'EMEA' 
	   ELSE RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR
	   END AS SL1-- ADDED THIS TO MAKE SL1 AND C3 IN SYNC
 ,SUM(COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT) TSS_REV
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_PNL_REV_COST_MEASURE  MSR
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_ME RSH 
	ON	RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=MSR.BK_TRNGLTD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY CNTRY 
	ON	CNTRY.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=RSH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
	INNER JOIN (SELECT CTRL_FISCAL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,RFISCAL.FISCAL_QTR_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER, RFISCAL.FISCAL_MONTH_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER,CTRL_FISCAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT   
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFISCAL  
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CTRL_FISCAL
ON  CTRL_FISCAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=RFISCAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AND CTRL_FISCAL.MONTH_RANK=1) REV_MTH
ON 1=1 
WHERE MSR.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  IN (202110,202109,202108)
-- BETWEEN REV_MTH.FISCAL_QTR_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER AND   REV_MTH.FISCAL_MONTH_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER
  AND MSR.DV_PRODUCT_TYPE='SERVICE'
 AND MSR.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD ='REVENUE'
 AND MSR.DV_PNL_REV_COST_TYPE= 'TSS_REVENUE'
 AND DV_PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME LIKE 'TS%' 
	AND	DV_PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME NOT IN ('TS REVENUE_MANADJ')
  AND CNTRY.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE <> 'UNK'-- ADDED THIS RULE
 GROUP BY 1,2,3
 )A
WHERE  A.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME=A.SL1 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME  ORDER	BY TSS_REV DESC) =1
 )  CCM_MAP_REF 
 ON  ( --CCM_MAP_REF.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME=SL1_MAP.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME
      CCM_MAP_REF.SL1=SL1_MAP.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME-- ADDED THIS TO MAKE SL1 AND C3 IN SYNC
	  ) 
 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( 
SEL	SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY 
FROM	 $$STGDB.WI_CCM_SSC_ID_SALES_TERR_KEY  ID_SLK  
WHERE	ID_SLK.SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY=TAC.SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY)

SELECT 
 FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY
 ,BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT
 ,SRC_RPTD_SR_NUMBER_INT
 ,DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
,DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,RMA_PCT AS SA_SLK_ALLOCATION_RATIO
,'IB_BASED' ALLOCATION_TYPE
, SUM(RMA_COST) RMA_COST
FROM (
SELECT 
RMA.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,CNTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,RMA.SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY
 ,RMA.BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT
 ,RMA.SRC_RPTD_SR_NUMBER_INT
,RMA.DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
,-999 DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,1 AS RMA_PCT
,-1 SL_NUM
,SUM(SSC_DPT_PRSNL_RSRC_CST_USD_AMT 
+SSC_DEPRECIATION_COST_USD_AMT 
+SSC_REPAIR_COST_USD_AMT 
+SSC_DUTY_VAT_COST_USD_AMT 
+SSC_THRD_PRTY_LGST_CST_USD_AMT
+SSC_THRD_PRTY_MTNC_CST_USD_AMT
+SSC_ORIG_EQP_MFGR_CST_USD_AMT) RMA_COST
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_SRVC_SUPPORT_CENTER_COST RMA
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CNTL
ON CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = RMA.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
WHERE 1=2 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8) A  WHERE SL_NUM=1
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9
attributes.Pre SQL:
CREATE MULTISET VOLATILE TABLE SL_RMA_IB_BASED AS 
(
SELECT * FROM 
(SELECT RMA.BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT ,
COALESCE(RMA_DTL.BK_CUST_RPRTD_PRD_SERIAL_NUM,000000) AS BK_CUST_RPRTD_PRD_SERIAL_NUM,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RMA_LINE.BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT ORDER BY RMA_DTL.EDW_CREATE_DTM DESC) SL_NUM
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_SRVC_SUPPORT_CENTER_COST RMA
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CNTL
ON CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = RMA.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT,REPAIR_ORDER_LINE_KEY
FROM $$SERVICEVWDB.N_REPAIR_ORDER_LINE 
WHERE BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT IN (SELECT BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_SRVC_SUPPORT_CENTER_COST WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN( SELECT	FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  FROM	$$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL)
 GROUP BY 1) 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT ORDER BY REPAIR_ORDER_LINE_KEY  DESC)=1
)RMA_LINE 
ON RMA_LINE.BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT=RMA.BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT		
LEFT JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.N_REPAIR_ORDER_LINE_RTRN_DTL RMA_DTL ON RMA_DTL.REPAIR_ORDER_LINE_KEY=RMA_LINE.REPAIR_ORDER_LINE_KEY    
WHERE	RMA.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN( SELECT	FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  FROM	$$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL)                       
GROUP BY 1,2,RMA_LINE.BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT,RMA_DTL.EDW_CREATE_DTM
) A 
--WHERE SL_NUM=1
)  WITH DATA ON COMMIT PRESERVE ROWS; 


INSERT INTO $$STGDB.WI_CCM_SSC_ID_SALES_TERR_KEY
SELECT 
 FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY
 ,BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT
 ,SRC_RPTD_SR_NUMBER_INT
 ,DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
,DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,RMA_PCT AS SA_SLK_ALLOCATION_RATIO
,'IB_BASED' ALLOCATION_TYPE
, SUM(RMA_COST) RMA_COST
FROM (
SELECT 
RMA.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,CNTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,RMA.SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY
 ,RMA.BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT
 ,RMA.SRC_RPTD_SR_NUMBER_INT
,RMA.DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
,COALESCE(IB.IP_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999) AS DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,1 AS RMA_PCT
,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RSN.BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT ORDER BY SALES_TERRITORY_KEY DESC) SL_NUM
,SUM(SSC_DPT_PRSNL_RSRC_CST_USD_AMT 
+SSC_DEPRECIATION_COST_USD_AMT 
+SSC_REPAIR_COST_USD_AMT 
+SSC_DUTY_VAT_COST_USD_AMT 
+SSC_THRD_PRTY_LGST_CST_USD_AMT
+SSC_THRD_PRTY_MTNC_CST_USD_AMT
+SSC_ORIG_EQP_MFGR_CST_USD_AMT) RMA_COST
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_SRVC_SUPPORT_CENTER_COST RMA
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CNTL
ON CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = RMA.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
INNER JOIN SL_RMA_IB_BASED RSN
ON RMA.BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT=RSN.BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT
LEFT JOIN (SEL DU_BK_SERIAL_NUM,INSTALLED_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,IP_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,BILL_TO_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_KEY,SHIP_TO_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_KEY FROM 
$$IBVWDB.N_INSTALLED_PRODUCT WHERE DU_BK_SERIAL_NUM IN(SEL BK_CUST_RPRTD_PRD_SERIAL_NUM FROM SL_RMA_IB_BASED GROUP BY 1)
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY DU_BK_SERIAL_NUM ORDER BY IP_KEY DESC)=1 ) IB ON IB.DU_BK_SERIAL_NUM = RSN.BK_CUST_RPRTD_PRD_SERIAL_NUM
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SH 
ON (SH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=IB.IP_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AND 
SH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR NOT IN ('MISC-MISCL1','INTERNAL NON-REVENUE','EUROPEAN MARKETS','WW Distribution')) 
WHERE RMA.SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY NOT IN (SELECT SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_SSC_ID_SALES_TERR_KEY WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
IN( SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL)) GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,RSN.BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY) A  WHERE SL_NUM=1
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9;

attributes.Pre SQL:
CREATE MULTISET VOLATILE TABLE VT_DIRECT_MAP_RMA_PCT2 AS (
SELECT  
FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,RMA_COST
,NULLIFZERO(SUM(RMA_COST) OVER (PARTITION BY DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY))/NULLIFZERO(SUM(RMA_COST) OVER (PARTITION BY DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME)) RMA_PCT
FROM    
(SELECT 
FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME,
SR.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
SUM(RMA_COST) RMA_COST
FROM    $$STGDB.WI_CCM_SSC_ID_SALES_TERR_KEY SR 
WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM  $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL)
AND       DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME<>'N/A'
AND ALLOCATION_TYPE IN ( 'DIRECT_MAP_USING_CONTRACT')
GROUP  BY 1,2,3)A
GROUP  BY 1,2,3,RMA_COST,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
)WITH    DATA
ON         COMMIT PRESERVE ROWS;

COLLECT              STATS    ON    VT_DIRECT_MAP_RMA_PCT2 COLUMN (DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME);
COLLECT              STATS    ON    VT_DIRECT_MAP_RMA_PCT2 COLUMN (FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT);
COLLECT              STATS    ON    VT_DIRECT_MAP_RMA_PCT2 COLUMN (DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME,FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT);

INSERT  INTO $$STGDB.WI_CCM_SSC_ID_SALES_TERR_KEY
SELECT  
FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY
  ,BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT
,SRC_RPTD_SR_NUMBER_INT
  ,DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
,DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,RMA_PCT AS SA_SLK_ALLOCATION_RATIO
,'EC_BASED' ALLOCATION_TYPE
, SUM(RMA_COST) RMA_COST
FROM    (
SELECT  
RMA.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,CNTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,RMA.SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY
,RMA.BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT
,RMA.SRC_RPTD_SR_NUMBER_INT
,RMA.DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
,VT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,COALESCE(VT.RMA_PCT,1) RMA_PCT
,SUM(SSC_DPT_PRSNL_RSRC_CST_USD_AMT                      
+SSC_DEPRECIATION_COST_USD_AMT                   
+SSC_REPAIR_COST_USD_AMT                  
+SSC_DUTY_VAT_COST_USD_AMT                           
+SSC_THRD_PRTY_LGST_CST_USD_AMT
+SSC_THRD_PRTY_MTNC_CST_USD_AMT
+SSC_ORIG_EQP_MFGR_CST_USD_AMT) RMA_COST
FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_SRVC_SUPPORT_CENTER_COST  RMA
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CNTL
ON CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = RMA.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         
INNER JOIN VT_DIRECT_MAP_RMA_PCT2 VT 
ON RMA.DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME =VT.DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME 
AND RMA.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=VT.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
WHERE END_CUST_ENRICHMENT_MTHOD_NAME IN ( 'EC_DIRECT_MAP_CONTRACT_1:1' ,'EC_DIRECT_MAP_CONTRACT_1:M') 
 AND RMA.SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY NOT IN (SELECT  SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_SSC_ID_SALES_TERR_KEY 
WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN( SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL)
)GROUP  BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8) A 
GROUP  BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9;

CREATE MULTISET VOLATILE TABLE VT_DIRECT_MAP_RMA_PCT AS (
SELECT  
FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,RMA_COST
,NULLIFZERO(SUM(RMA_COST) OVER (PARTITION BY DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY))/NULLIFZERO(SUM(RMA_COST) OVER (PARTITION BY DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME)) RMA_PCT
FROM    
(SELECT 
FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME,
SR.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
SUM(RMA_COST) RMA_COST
FROM  $$STGDB.WI_CCM_SSC_ID_SALES_TERR_KEY SR 
WHERE  FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL)
AND DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME<>'N/A'
AND ALLOCATION_TYPE IN ('IB_BASED') 
GROUP  BY 1,2,3)A
GROUP  BY 1,2,3,RMA_COST,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
)WITH DATA
ON COMMIT PRESERVE ROWS; 

COLLECT STATS ON  VT_DIRECT_MAP_RMA_PCT COLUMN (DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME);
COLLECT STATS ON  VT_DIRECT_MAP_RMA_PCT COLUMN (FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT);
COLLECT STATS ON  VT_DIRECT_MAP_RMA_PCT COLUMN (DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME,FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT);

INSERT  INTO $$STGDB.WI_CCM_SSC_ID_SALES_TERR_KEY
SELECT  
 FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY
,BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT
,SRC_RPTD_SR_NUMBER_INT
,DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
,DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,RMA_PCT AS SA_SLK_ALLOCATION_RATIO
,'EC_BASED' ALLOCATION_TYPE
,SUM(RMA_COST) RMA_COST
FROM    (
SELECT  
RMA.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,CNTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,RMA.SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY
,RMA.BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT
,RMA.SRC_RPTD_SR_NUMBER_INT
,RMA.DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
,VT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,COALESCE(VT.RMA_PCT,1) RMA_PCT
,SUM(SSC_DPT_PRSNL_RSRC_CST_USD_AMT                      
+SSC_DEPRECIATION_COST_USD_AMT                   
+SSC_REPAIR_COST_USD_AMT                  
+SSC_DUTY_VAT_COST_USD_AMT                           
+SSC_THRD_PRTY_LGST_CST_USD_AMT
+SSC_THRD_PRTY_MTNC_CST_USD_AMT
+SSC_ORIG_EQP_MFGR_CST_USD_AMT) RMA_COST
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_SRVC_SUPPORT_CENTER_COST  RMA
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CNTL
ON CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = RMA.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         
INNER JOIN VT_DIRECT_MAP_RMA_PCT VT 
               ON         RMA.DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME =VT.DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME 
               AND       RMA.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=VT.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
WHERE END_CUST_ENRICHMENT_MTHOD_NAME IN ( 'EC_DIRECT_MAP_IB')
AND RMA.SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY NOT IN (SELECT SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_SSC_ID_SALES_TERR_KEY 
WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN( SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL)

)
GROUP  BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8) A 
GROUP  BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9;

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	
 CNTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
 ,CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
 ,SSC.SERVICE_REQUEST_SSC_COST_KEY
 ,SSC.BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT
 ,SSC.SRC_RPTD_SR_NUMBER_INT
 ,SSC.DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
 ,GL_REV_DRIVER_RATIO.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 ,GL_REV_DRIVER_RATIO.SA_SLK_ALLOCATION_RATIO
 ,'DIRECT_MAP_USING_CONTRACT' ALLOCATION_TYPE
 ,SUM(SSC_DPT_PRSNL_RSRC_CST_USD_AMT		
+SSC_DEPRECIATION_COST_USD_AMT		
+SSC_REPAIR_COST_USD_AMT		
+SSC_DUTY_VAT_COST_USD_AMT		
+SSC_THRD_PRTY_LGST_CST_USD_AMT
+SSC_THRD_PRTY_MTNC_CST_USD_AMT
+SSC_ORIG_EQP_MFGR_CST_USD_AMT) RMA_COST	
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_SRVC_SUPPORT_CENTER_COST SSC
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CNTL
 ON CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = SSC.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_REV_MAPPING_DATA  GL_REV_DRIVER_RATIO
 ON GL_REV_DRIVER_RATIO.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NOTE_TXT = SSC.SRC_RPTD_SERVICE_CONTARCT_NUM 
 and GL_REV_DRIVER_RATIO.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME=CNTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME 
 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9
